compiled_state.title: record-review.sh CHANGED_FILES overlap check includes untracked files that may not be reviewed

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Root cause: line 269 includes git ls-files --others in CHANGED_FILES, but the review diff excludes untracked files, so the overlap check can match against files not in the reviewed diff.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
